title: Fire Galactus — move persona to severance

log.message: Created from Congress #31 verdict on: Is Galactus too powerful to be fired? Will we be destroyed by his wrath if he is removed from congre

Source verdict: Galactus failed silently when called to debate — a persona who cannot show up to argue for his own survival has already answered the question. No persona is above firing; the entire point of this syst...
